SUBJECT: Affiliates: $3MM launch, standings, more...

Jeff Walker here - please read this entire message, we have important news for you...

First of all, we pulled SMARTS off the market on Friday. That was NOT the original plan - we were only going to raise the price...

HOWEVER, some weird stuff happened in the social media world with people blogging about Stomper SMARTS and blaming us on some changes that are happening right now.

The bottom line is that we thought it better to safer than sorry, and we shut down the shopping cart on Friday.

HOWEVER, after much discussion we came up with a plan that's going to give us a GREAT chance to do a quick 24 hour re-release on Monday.

That means the launch is going to get even BIGGER. We are already at $3+ million, and this will just blow it open even wider.

And we're going to have ANOTHER ultra-cool prize for the affiliate who sells the most units in the 24 hour period starting at 12 noon eastern on Monday.

So be ready to send another promotion on Monday at noon. We will send you fresh swipe copy on Sunday.


--- Affiliate Standings ---

We do NOT have updated affiliate standings for you yet...

The reason is that Tom and his team are
hand-auditing a bunch of the orders (looking for "hanging chads" and stuff ;-) to make sure we get this right.

We made a LOT of sales on Friday... the orders were basically coming in at about one per minute for the last two or three hours. So there's probably going to be some real changes in the standings.

And with the cart re-opening on Monday for 24 hours, the standings are certainly going to get shaken up.

That's it for now... look for fresh swipe copy and an update tomorrow.


best regards,
Jeff Walker

P.S. I almost forgot... the launch is right at
$3 million so far. That means we paying out a HUGE chunk of commissions. And there's more to come on Monday.
